agents.name: Research Agent
agents.role: Researches competitors, trends, APIs, technical approaches, and business/app ideas.

agents.name: Business Agent
agents.role: Helps with monetisation, priorities, pricing, business strategy, and daily focus.

agents.name: Architect Agent
agents.role: Designs systems, routes, database structure, workflows, and feature specs.

agents.name: Developer Agent
agents.role: Reviews code, fixes bugs, writes implementation plans, prepares Cursor prompts.

agents.name: Marketing Agent
agents.role: Creates content ideas, positioning, ads, landing page copy, and launch strategy.
